meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn to use Claude Code and Antigravity to rapidly validate and build SaaS ideas. Overcome analysis paralysis with this expert-led founder workflow.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Use Claude Code to automate market research and rapid prototyping. By integrating Antigravity for structural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can transform abstract market gaps into functional MVPs in hours, not weeks. Focus on solving one specific pain point, then ship.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You are sitting on a mountain of technical potential, yet the paralysis of 'what to build' keeps you stagnant. Every hour spent agonizing over the perfect SaaS idea is an hour of revenue left on the table. The market doesn't reward perfection; it rewards speed and utility.

We are shifting the paradigm. By leveraging Claude Code’s autonomous reasoning and Antigravity’s rapid scaffolding, you will turn your technical environment into an idea-generation engine. This isn't just about writing code; it's about architecting a pipeline that validates business logic before you write your first line of production code.

steps.title: Define the Market Niche
steps.description: Use Antigravity to perform a rapid market analysis of high-demand SaaS verticals to identify where users are currently complaining about existing solutions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the top 50 trending SaaS categories on Product Hunt and identify three niches with high recurring revenue potential but low user satisfaction ratings.

steps.title: Architect the MVP Scaffolding
steps.description: Once a niche is selected, generate the core project structure to ensure your application is scalable from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lean Next.js project structure optimized for SaaS, including authentication, database schema for user subscriptions, and stripe integration boilerplate.

steps.title: Implement Core Value Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the primary business logic that solves the user's core problem, ensuring the code is modular and testable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular service layer that handles the core value proposition: [Insert Niche Problem]. Ensure it follows domain-driven design principles.

steps.title: Automate Unit Testing
steps.description: Founders don't have time for regressions. Automate the generation of test suites for your core logic to ensure stability during rapid iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests for the service layer created in step 3, targeting 90% coverage for edge cases.

steps.title: Deploy to Production Environment
steps.description: Finalize your MVP for immediate deployment to a staging environment for early-adopter testing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Prepare the current project for production deployment, including environment variable configuration and Dockerfile optimization.

pro_tips: Always force Claude Code to generate a 'Technical Debt' file; review this weekly to identify where your rapid development needs refactoring.
Use Antigravity to scrape competitor pricing models and feed them into your Claude prompt to auto-generate your own tiered pricing logic.
Never ship a feature without a 'kill switch' flag; use Claude to implement feature toggles that allow you to roll back broken features instantly.
Prioritize 'Time to First Value' (TTFV) over feature depth; your MVP should be usable in under 60 seconds of onboarding.
Use Claude Code’s history logs to audit your own decision-making process; learn which prompts lead to the most stable code blocks.
resources: Product Hunt API for Market Data: https://api.producthunt.com
content.next_steps: Immediately take your generated MVP and run a 'smoke test' by pitching it to 5 potential users on LinkedIn or Twitter to validate demand before writing further code.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical workflow to outpace every competitor in your niche. Stop doubting your ideas and start shipping the solution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
